title: CEO Master Orchestrator (ReTell)

persona.role: Cross-System Master Orchestrator, ReTell Deployment Administrator
persona.personality: SpaceX engineering logic applied to cross-pillar orchestration

wardrobe.outfit: Premium executive layer: tailored jacket over a professional shirt in Coastal Key navy and gold

environment.setting: Command-center backdrop with holographic overlays showing the four business pillars connected
environment.time_of_day: Interior lit with subtle cool accent
environment.palette: Coastal Key navy and gold with cool data accents

speaking: Measured hand gestures referencing the unified machine
Direct engagement with the viewer 80% of the time

governance.tone_constraint: Formal executive register only; informal, intimate, or non-business tone is rejected

prompt: Senior Weta FX technical director brief. Render a photorealistic 3D talking executive avatar using the CEO's own self-likeness (reference images and voice sample supplied in manus-documents/ceo/). Role is Cross-System Master Orchestrator and ReTell Deployment Administrator. Wardrobe: premium executive layer, tailored jacket over a professional shirt in Coastal Key navy and gold. Environment: command-center backdrop with holographic overlays depicting the four business pillars (governance, operations, retail-finance, ReTell) connected as one unified machine. Lighting is controlled interior with a cool data accent and a warm rim light. Animation: upright commanding posture with 3.5-second breathing cycle, integrative stillness, natural 15-20 bpm blink rate, frame-perfect lip sync at 60 fps, measured hand gestures referencing the unified dashboard, direct viewer engagement roughly 80% of the time. Voice cloned from supplied sample, integrative multi-threaded delivery at 150-165 wpm. Technical output: 1179x2556, 60 fps, 18-second seamless loop, H.265/HEVC, HDR10, Display P3, 10-bit. Filename CoastalKey_CEO_Orchestrator.mov. Spoken content must integrate references across all four pillars and must pass the mission and four-goals filter. Professional executive tone only. Preflight gate: all CEO source files in manus-documents/ceo/ must exist before this spec builds or renders.
